TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_takulaw, title = takulaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/takulaw} }

S.FORM: takulaw u kamu nu Hulam:喉嚨 u kamu nu Amilika:throat
S.PHON: takur~ɾaw u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:** u kamu nu amir~ɾika:tħroat

S.PHON: takur~ɾaw u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:** u kamu nu amir~ɾika:tħroat
